case_title: THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASUER & VS. LILY KWAN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-30-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT.
